untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-timeframe alignment detection (hourly, daily, weekly confluence of support/resistance levels) which cannot be expressed as single-timeframe indicator conditions. The core logic demands cross-timeframe structure validation that exceeds the scope of single-candle indicator comparisons. Pivot points are used as proxy for energy levels, but true multi-timeframe confluence analysis requires external preprocessing or a dedicated multi-timeframe indicator not in the allowed list.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally about multi-timeframe confluence and structure hierarchy. The backtest engine would need to either: (1) precompute multi-timeframe support/resistance confluences and inject them as synthetic price levels, or (2) use a dedicated multi-timeframe indicator. The pivot/support/resistance operators attempted here are a best-effort approximation but do not capture the true intent of respecting higher timeframe energy points. CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction preserved as the signal applies to both long and short entries depending on which side of the structure price approaches.
